data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the quiz/assessment option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the quiz/assessment option to confirm that users have read the policy documents. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a quiz/assessment option, but there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this feature is implemented or operational, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the quiz/assessment option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the quiz/assessment option requirement.
